mapper.insert: insert into permission (permission_id, permission_name, permission_code, description, module) values (#{permissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{permissionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{permissionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into permission
permission_id,
permission_name,
permission_code,
description,
module,
#{permissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{permissionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{permissionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update permission
permission_name = #{permissionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
permission_code = #{permissionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
module = #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where permission_id = #{permissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
from permission order by module, permission_id

select p.permission_id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.description, p.module from permission p join role_permission rp on p.permission_id = rp.permission_id where rp.role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct p.permission_id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.description, p.module from permission p join role_permission rp on p.permission_id = rp.permission_id join admin_role ar on rp.role_id = ar.role_id where ar.admin_id = #{adminId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select
from permission where module = #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by permission_id
